settings.heading: Corporate Memento Ideas for Employees & Clients
settings.subheading: On-brand corporate memento ideas — desk crystal, branded wood-acrylic, milestone keepsakes and welcome/farewell gifts that carry your logo and message. By Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Strong corporate memento ideas are on-brand and useful: desk crystal pieces, branded wood-acrylic keepsakes, milestone awards and welcome/farewell mementos — each with your logo and a short message. Meru Trophy designs co-ordinated sets. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Ideas that work
settings.text: Corporate mementos work best when they're on-brand and meaningful — a desk keepsake the recipient actually keeps. Use your logo and a short, sincere message, and keep the design consistent across the set. Ideas below suit employee recognition, client gifting, onboarding and farewells.

settings.heading: Popular designs
settings.text:
• Desk crystal block — logo + message, premium and compact.
  • Branded wood-acrylic — modern, on-brand keepsake.
  • Milestone memento — for anniversaries and long service.
  • Welcome kit memento — for new joiners.
  • Client appreciation piece — thank-you gift with logo.
  • Conference/speaker token — felicitation memento.

settings.question: What's a good corporate memento?
settings.answer: An on-brand, useful keepsake (often desk crystal or wood-acrylic) with your logo and a short, sincere message.

settings.question: Can you keep the whole set on-brand?
settings.answer: Yes — one design language and your logo across every piece.

settings.question: Do you do client-gifting mementos?
settings.answer: Yes — appreciation and thank-you pieces with your branding.

settings.question: Do you provide GST invoices?
settings.answer: Yes — GST invoices and PO handling for corporate orders.

settings.heading: Planning corporate mementos?
settings.text: Tell us what you're planning — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
